category_mappings.notes: Education-service income candidate; confirm legal status/PDV.
Sale of goods candidate; fiscalization/PDV may apply.
Often a transfer, not operating revenue.
Often transfer; only FX result hits 563/663.
Could be provision, service, settlement, or other expense.

posting_templates.label: Direct cash/bank revenue
posting_templates.notes: Use for immediately paid revenue; invoice/SEF workflow may require receivable and VAT accounts.

posting_templates.label: Invoice / receivable then payment
posting_templates.notes: Use when income is invoiced before payment.

posting_templates.label: Supplier bill/direct expense payment
posting_templates.debit_rule: 5xx expense and 27x input VAT if allowed
posting_templates.notes: Use invoice evidence/SEF matching when available.

posting_templates.label: Owner / related-party review
posting_templates.debit_rule: depends: loan, distribution, dividend, liability, expense

posting_templates.label: Legal dispute / provision review
posting_templates.notes: Could be provision, settlement, legal services, debt, or other expense.

posting_templates.label: Tax/government payment review
posting_templates.notes: Tax type must be identified before posting.

tax_treatments.label: PDV treatment needs review
tax_treatments.notes: Do not assume PDV status without invoice/SEF and company profile.

tax_treatments.label: Input PDV review
tax_treatments.notes: Requires supplier invoice/SEF and right to deduct.

tax_treatments.label: Payroll tax/contributions
tax_treatments.notes: Requires payroll rules and PPP-PD later.

tax_treatments.label: SEF / e-faktura matching required
tax_treatments.notes: Use when transaction should link to e-invoice evidence.
